positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, neo-art deco stained-glass botanical pattern. The central motif features intertwined stylized fauna, such as stylized hummingbirds and geometric dragonflies, set within symmetrical mandalas of bioluminescent flora. Use deep indigo, vibrant emerald green, burnt gold, and stark white linework. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to repeat seamlessly, creating a high-contrast, intricate, and elegant silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Art style: Japanese ukiyo-e meets sacred geometry, vector-art clean lines, strong contour lines, flat design aesthetic, perfect symmetry, 8K print quality, high contrast.
negative: blur, low quality, grainy, watermark, signature, text, words, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, artifact, smear, amateur, messy, gradient, photorealism
